1.name: Classic White Model
1.summary: Security door in white with gold ornamentation and classic architectural details. Superior durability paired with an elegant appearance.

2.name: Classic Wood Model
2.summary: Security door with rich dark wood surface, decorative frame, and classic architectural details. Delivers refined styling and high durability together.

3.name: Modern Minimalist Interior Door
3.summary: Modern interior door design in dark gray with vertical lines and geometric panels. Complements minimalist décor with a sleek, functional look.

628.name: Modern Steel Door with Hexagonal Honeycomb Pattern and Gray Details — YC-51

629.name: Gray Steel Door with Vertical Stripes and Oak Combination — YC-52
629.summary: Stepped design with interlocking vertical panels in anthracite gray and light oak. Matte black vertical handle and clean modern lines—a refined choice for apartment entrances.

630.name: Steel Door with Oval Center Panel and Chevron Wood Pattern — YC-53
630.summary: Light-toned base with a centrally placed oval form. Natural wood chevron cladding within the oval area—a synthesis of classic and modern.

631.name: Minimal Wood-Look Steel Door with Triangular Handle — YC-54
631.summary: Clean surface with a fully natural wood look (dark walnut/cherry). Minimalist, distinguished presence with a custom black triangular handle accessory that animates the design.

632.name: Black and White Vertical-Line Contrast Steel Door — YC-55
632.summary: White base with fine black vertical lines and a wide glossy black panel block on the right. A bold, modern model for lovers of high contrast.

633.name: Luxury Walnut and White Steel Door with Wavy Pattern — YC-56
633.summary: White and walnut wood surfaces separated by curved (wavy) black lines. An asymmetric design that adds movement and character to the entrance.

640.name: Steel Door with Vertical Wood Slats and Cream Combination — YC-63
